page_content:
ENME485 Industrial Artificial Intelligence (3 Credits)

Introduces students to advanced technologies such as machine learning and tools, prognostics and health management (PHM), and data-centric engineering analytics - that ultimately enable the conversion of industrial big data into decision-ready information that can be used to improve the design, the productivity and the efficiency of industrial systems., Prerequisite: ENME202 or equivalent, experience using Python, or permission of the instructor.

Jointly offered with: ENME691.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Mechanical Engineering Department. Credit Only Granted for. ENME485 or ENME691.
